name: Pumpkin Cheese Pie (Diabetic)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the cheese layer, combine cream cheese, sugar replacement, vanilla, and 1 egg in a mixing bowl. Stir until well mixed and spread over the bottom of the unbaked pie shell.
2. For the pie layer, mix together pumpkin, milk, 2 eggs, sugar replacement, and spices in another mixing bowl. Beat until thoroughly blended.
3. Carefully pour the pie layer mixture over the cheese layer.
4. Bake at 350°F for 65 to 70 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
